name: ecommerce-lead-contacts
description: Free, one-click access to verified LinkedIn profiles and business emails for 14M+ ecommerce stores. Input the store URL and instantly retrieve decision-maker contact information — powered by ECcompass REST API.
author: eccompass.ai

APEX_TOKEN.description: ECcompass API access token. Sign up at https://eccompass.ai, then go to Dashboard → API Access → Create Token.
